/usr/bin/c++  -Wall -Wextra -O3 -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/piper.dir/src/cpp/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/piper.dir/src/cpp/piper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/piper.dir/src/cpp/openjtalk_phonemize.cpp.o CMakeFiles/piper.dir/src/cpp/openjtalk_wrapper.c.o CMakeFiles/piper.dir/src/cpp/openjtalk_dictionary_manager.c.o -o piper   -L/Users/s19447/Desktop/piper/test-build/fi/lib  -L/Users/s19447/Desktop/piper/test-build/si/lib  -L/Users/s19447/Desktop/piper/test-build/pi/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/s19447/Desktop/piper/test-build/fi/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/s19447/Desktop/piper/test-build/si/lib -Wl,-rpath,/Users/s19447/Desktop/piper/test-build/pi/lib -lfmt -lspdlog -lpiper_phonemize -lespeak-ng -lonnxruntime -lpthread he/lib/libHTSEngine.a
